title: Speculations Rise Over David Wilcock's Reported Death Amid UFO Community Losses
description: The UFO research community is in mourning following the reported death of David Wilcock, which has ignited speculation online. Fans are drawing connections to other recent losses, including Nick Pope and Erich von Däniken. As reactions pour in, many are questioning the accuracy of the claims while expressing their grief. This article delves into the unfolding situation and the impact of these losses on the community.

title: Amy Eskridge update: UFO scientist's old texts cast doubt on cause of death; ‘would never kill myself’
description: Amy Eskridge, a UFO researcher working on anti-gravity who died in 2022 in Huntsville, Alabama, on June 11, 2022, with her official cause of death ruled as a self-inflicted gunshot wound. The death has continued to be under suspicion of UFO enthusiasts who dispute the official cause of death and allege a larger conspiracy. title: Are David Wilcock, Nick Pope and Erich von Däniken's Deaths Connected? 3 UFO Figures Dead in Months
description: People have noted a concerning trend in losses within the UFO community, though no concrete evidence supports such claims.

title: Amy Eskridge update: UFO scientist's old texts cast doubt on cause of death; ‘would never kill myself’
description: New texts show Amy Eskridge feared harm, denying suicide or overdose before her death. A friend claims she reported harassment and planned to expose it.

title: David Wilcock death: Who is Dr John Brandenburg? Plasma physicist claims life in danger as UFO experts turn up dead
description: Dr John Brandenburg, a plasma physicist claimed on X that his life was in danger amid the deaths of UFO experts David Wilcock, Nick Pope, and Erich von Daniken.
